title: Censored the US verson Reis nipple
display_title: Censored the US verson Reis nipple
wikitext:
[]: Censored the US verson? (Rei's nipple) Post by Ritsuko » Sat Feb 26, 2011 3:32 pm Small crap like this pisses me off to no freaking end. Do you know what else was censored in 1.11 and 2.22? (Been watching the Japan version for a long time) Bet a giant Rei/Lilith will be censored next?

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Feb 26, 2011 3:42 pm I haven't seen the Japan version. But, do you mean this nipple from the Funi release of 1.11 was missing? Rei Nipples!  SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by gatotsu911 » Sat Feb 26, 2011 4:06 pm I'm quite sure the US version contained no censorship whatsoever. It had nudity and everything. Why would they censor it? It's not like they're marketing it to kids.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Feb 26, 2011 4:19 pm They changed titles and text as far as I'm aware, but no editing of the content.

[]: Post by Ritsuko » Sat Feb 26, 2011 4:23 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I haven't seen the Japan version. But, do you mean this nipple from the Funi release of 1.11 was missing? Rei Nipples!  SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Eva 04 » Sat Feb 26, 2011 4:28 pm Ritsuko wrote: Yes, it is that scene. On my bluray version 1.11 they moved her body more to the left so we can't see the nipple.

[]: Post by Ritsuko » Sat Feb 26, 2011 4:30 pm Eva 04 wrote: It must just be you then because my copy of 1.11 didnt have that happen.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Feb 26, 2011 4:54 pm Ritsuko wrote: For me it look like this. SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by gatotsu911 » Sat Feb 26, 2011 5:08 pm YOUR TELEVISION IS CENSORING YOUR MOVIES Also, if that were censorship, it would've been hilariously incompetent censorship, because you can still totally see the nipples.

[]: Post by Ritsuko » Sat Feb 26, 2011 5:52 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Haha! Let me explain. Most televisions crop a little from side to side and up and down. Why this is done is beyond me. Most new model wide-screen televisions are better at keeping everything uncropped. My brother's 40" Samsung LCD series 6 630 left the entire picture uncropped. That framing is consistent on both the 1.01 copy, then 1.11 DVD and Blu-ray discs I saw on his Samsung. Many older model CTR TVs (4:3 tube-televisions) start cropping in on all sides for some reason, even with the black bars maintaining the wide-screen aspect ratio.

[]: Post by gatotsu911 » Sat Feb 26, 2011 6:00 pm Ritsuko wrote: My TV betrayed me!! Why?? TV, how could you choose your aspect ratio over me ??

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Feb 26, 2011 6:01 pm Yeah, I didn't even notice the nipple until I saw it on my brother's wide-screen TV in friggin' HD BD. The tube set in my room had cropped it out completely. I was like "Oh, there's a nipple there in 1080p where I didn't think there was one before..."

[]: Post by gatotsu911 » Sat Feb 26, 2011 6:04 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: "Oh, there's a nipple there in 1080p where I didn't think there was one before..."

[]: Post by soul.assassin » Sat Feb 26, 2011 10:39 pm This thread left me ROFLMAO and a lesson: adjust the TV before playing.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Feb 27, 2011 6:01 am Try messing around with the option of your TV, if you have the BD I suppose that you're using an HDTV, aren't you?

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sun Feb 27, 2011 7:24 am Did you know Rei's nipple is visible in the same scene in episode 5 of NGE? It's true, but it's impossible to see unless you're watching it on a computer or a recent TV of the right sort.

[]: Post by Kendrix » Sun Feb 27, 2011 8:50 am NAveryW wrote: Did you know Rei's nipple is visible in the same scene in episode 5 of NGE? It's true, but it's impossible to see unless you're watching it on a computer or a recent TV of the right sort.

[]: Post by Ritsuko » Sun Feb 27, 2011 12:01 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: Try messing around with the option of your TV, if you have the BD I suppose that you're using an HDTV, aren't you?

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Feb 27, 2011 3:02 pm Oh my god, you guys, are we seriously having a thread about a nipple? Is this what we've come to?

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sun Feb 27, 2011 3:19 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Oh my god, you guys, are we seriously having a thread about a nipple? Is this what we've come to?
